name: plain-language explainer: a cost term is grounded in the FinOps framework
command:
cat > opts.json <<'JEOF'
{"options":[{"option_id":"opt-balanced","patterns":["encryption_at_rest","audit_logging","multi_az","autoscaling","rightsizing","monitoring"]}]}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/explain.sh" --annotate opts.json --out exp.md --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
grep -E 'rightsizing.*finops-framework' exp.md >/dev/null && echo cost-glossed 1>&2
